---
title: "cbt_data_analysis"
author: "Jinwei Zhang"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r load xlsx data}
library(readxl)
df <- read_excel("data/cbtdata.xlsx")
names(df)
#head(df)
#str(df)
```

```{r remove the unrelated columns, keep k only}
library(tidyverse)
df_k <- df %>% 
  select(Semaine, K1A, K2A, K3A, K4A, K5A, K6A)
head(df_k)
```
